name: GitHub Devwatch
description: Monitor pull requests, issues, and releases across GitHub repositories with notifications and a local activity feed.
author: Jonathan Martin

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://api.github.com https://github.com https://registry.npmjs.org; img-src 'self' data: https://github.com https://*.github.com https://githubusercontent.com https://*.githubusercontent.com; default-src 'self'; style-src 'self'
